summaries: • ADVENTHTL (Results): Advent Hotels International Limited announced the approval of its Q4 and full-year audited financial results for FY2026, which received an unmodified audit opinion. A material impact and potential red flag, however, is the immediate dissolution of its voluntarily constituted Risk Management Committee, with the company stating it's not currently mandatory. While legally permissible, this decision may signal a weakening of corporate governance and proactive risk management oversight. └ 📄 Source

• ADVENTHTL (Results): Advent Hotels International Limited approved its fourth-quarter and full-year financial results for FY2026, which received an unmodified audit opinion, indicating fair financial reporting. However, the Board simultaneously dissolved its voluntarily constituted Risk Management Committee, citing it's not currently mandatory, which presents a corporate governance concern regarding reduced formal risk oversight. └ 📄 Source
